item.description:
# Clip 1.0.1
This maintenance release verifies Clip's signed in-app update path from version 1.0.0. It contains the same recording, preview, export, History, and Settings features as the initial release.
## Updates
Clip 1.0.0 can discover this release automatically or through **Check for Updates…** in the menu-bar popover. The updater verifies the download with the public EdDSA key embedded in Clip before installing it.
## Requirements and first launch
Clip requires macOS 15 or later on Apple silicon.
This build is Apple Development signed but is not Developer ID signed or notarized. A direct browser download may therefore require **Open Anyway** in **System Settings → Privacy & Security**. This limitation will remain until a Developer ID–signed and notarized release is available.
